folio.label: 195r
folio.l: Sire Nonnes Preest , oure hoost seide a noon

note.notetxt: 1no rubrics, written with a dark shade of ink, don't think before NU. Double check.ODR

folio.l: I blissed be thy brethe , & euäy ston
This was a murie tale , of Chauntecleer
But by my trouthe , if æè were seculer
Thow woldest ben a tredfoul , a rigút
For if æè haue corage , as æè hast mygút
The were nede of hennes , as I wene
ña , moo than seuene tymes , seuentene
